name: Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash - WER
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash - WER
SIGMA Description: This rule detects a suspicious crash of the Microsoft Malware Protection Engine

False positives:
- MsMpEng might crash if the "C:\" partition is full

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows error reporting%' AND "Event ID"=1001 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msmpeng.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mpengine.dll%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash - WER on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%windows error reporting%' AND "Event ID"=1001 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msmpeng.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mpengine.dll%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Malware Protection Engine Crash - WER

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
